description: Bring back the joy of walking with these newfeel shoes. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure. Wear it for everyday walks or as a daily wear for your day-to-day chores around your block.Upper Soft upper made of mesh for enhanced ventilation for the feet Synthetic leather overlays for added support to the upper Reinforced overlay at backfoot and around toe box for enhanced foot support and durability Lightly padded collar and tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Synthetic twill laces for durability Stitch detailing for enhanced durability and subtle styling Midsole EVA midsole for soft cushioning and shock absorption, protecting the feet from impact Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Flex grooves in multi-directional pattern for natural movement of the foot with utmost grip and stability EssenSole insole with polyurethane insert to provide midfoot stability for maximum support on all terrains Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
